name: CubePilot Here4 Multiband RTK GNSS GPS Module
description: The Here 4 is a professional High Precision Dual-band RTK Navigation module.

name: RadioMaster ERS-GPS Telemetry Sensor - ELRS ER
description: The Radiomaster ERS-GPS Telemetry Sensor is a compact, plug-and-play GPS module designed for use with ExpressLRS PWM receivers via the CRSF interface.

name: Holybro H-RTK Helical GPS Antenna Mount
description: Introducing the Holybro H-RTK Helical GPS Antenna Mount, a precision-engineered solution designed to house your GPS module securely for seamless integration into your aerial platforms.

name: Holybro Micro M10 GPS w/ Case
description: This Holybro Micro M10 GPS unit utilizes multi-constellation GNSS powered by u-blox M10, a concurrent GNSS receiver capable of receiving and tracking multiple GNSS systems.

name: CubePilot Here4 Base
description: The Here 4 Base, a product of CubePilot, is compatible with both Ardupilot and PX4 systems.

name: Holybro DroneCAN RM3100 Professional Grade Compass (42cm)
description: The Holybro DroneCAN RM3100 Professional Grade Compass is an advanced compass/magnetometer designed for precise navigation and heading accuracy in unmanned vehicles.

name: Lumenier SAM-M10Q GPS Module - NDAA
description: This Lumenier GPS Module features an integrated UBLOX SAM-M10Q and magnetometer for precise positioning in a compact and lightweight design.

name: Holybro M9N Standard GPS w/ 10-Pin Cable
description: The Holybro M9N GPS uses multi-constellation GNSS powered by u-blox M9N, a concurrent GNSS receiver that can receive and track multiple GNSS systems.

name: HGLRC M100 Mini GPS
description: Using the new 10th-generation UBLOX chip design, the HGLRC M100 GPS positioning is fast and accurate. The small 15x15mm size can be loaded on 2-7 inch drones. The ceramic antenna and externally expanded PCB design allow M100 MINI GPS to receive satellite signals effectively.

name: Flywoo GOKU GM10 Mini V3 GPS Module
description: The Flywoo GOKU GM10 Mini V3 GPS Module now with more accurate positioning and faster Star Search using the latest M10050 GNSS Chip.

name: HGLRC M80 Pro GPS Module for FPV Drone Racing
description: The HGLRC M80 PRO GPS Module comes with a QMC5883 chip to help identify the location of your drone quickly. Ideal for FPV racing drones!

name: HGLRC M100 Pro GPS Module
description: Unlock next-level navigation performance with the HGLRC M100Pro GPS Module. Powered by a cutting-edge 10th-generation chip, this compact module supports 120 channels and effortlessly tracks over 50 satellites for lightning-fast, accurate positioning.

name: Flywoo GOKU GM10 Pro V3 GPS Module w/ Compass
description: The Flywoo GOKU GM10 Pro V3 GPS Module with Compass and with more accurate positioning and faster Star Search using the latest M10050 GNSS Chip.

name: iFlight Defender 25 BLITZ Split GPS
description: The iFlight Defender 25 BLITZ Split GPS is an innovative GPS module tailored for seamless integration with the Defender25 drone.

name: Flywoo GOKU GM10 Nano V3.1 GPS Module
description: The V3.1 version of the GOKU GM10 Nano GPS retains its extremely small size and adds a new plug.

name: Flywoo GOKU GM10 Mini V3 GPS w/ Compass
description: The Flywoo GOKU GM10 Mini V3 GPS with Compass brings an added layer of navigational precision to drone enthusiasts.

name: GEPRC M10 Nano GPS Module
description: The GEP-M10 Nano GPS module offers a compact size, fast and stable positioning, and user-friendly operation.

name: Flywoo BQNANO V1 Compass/Baro Module
description: The Flywoo BQNANO V1 Compass/Baro Module is a nano module with a QMC5883L compass and BMP280 barometer combined.

name: HGLRC M80 GPS Module for FPV Drone Racing
description: Get precise location data for your drone with the HGLRC M80 GPS Module!

name: Frsky GPS ADV Telemetry Sensor
description: FrSky has enhanced the performance and capability of the original sensor line, resulting in the development of the new ADVANCE (ADV) FrSky GPS ADV Telemetry Sensor.

name: iFlight BLITZ Mini M10 GPS V2
description: The newly upgraded iFlight BLITZ Mini M10 GPS V2  has arrived, offering faster and more stable satellite search with the 10th generation chipset.

name: FlyFishRC M10QMC-5883L GPS & Compass Module
description: The FlyFishRC M10QMC-5883L GPS & Compass Module is a small size, fast positioning, easy-to-use GPS.

name: CubePilot The Cube Orange+ Standard Set
description: The Cube Orange+ Standard Set (IMU V8) features a high-performance H7 processor and the 1090MHz ADS-B receiver from uAvionix.

name: NewBeeDrone BeeID V1.1 M10Q GPS Module + Remote ID
description: The NewBeeDrone BeeID V1.1 M10Q GPS Module with RemoteID & Drone Tracker goes beyond compliance.

name: Holybro Micro M10 GPS Module w/o Case
description: This Holybro Micro M10 GPS unit utilizes multi-constellation GNSS powered by u-blox M10, a concurrent GNSS receiver capable of receiving and tracking multiple GNSS systems.

name: Holybro H-RTK Mosaic-H GPS Module w/ Dual Antennas
description: The Holybro H-RTK Mosaic-H, with Septentrio's elite GNSS receiver, offers advanced RTK GPS in a compact design.

name: CubePilot HerePro GPS Module
description: The CubePilot HerePro is a professional high-precision Multi-band RTK Navigation module.

name: CubePilot HerePro USB Adapter Board
description: The CubePilot HerePro USB Adapter Board offers a seamless connection between the adapter board and external devices via USB.

name: Holybro CAN Hub Module w/ 27cm Cable
description: The Holybro CAN Hub Module is a powered CAN port expansion module developed for various flight controllers and their supporting peripherals.

name: Holybro H-RTK Helical GPS Vertical Mount
description: Introducing the Holybro H-RTK Helical GPS Vertical Mount a precision-engineered solution designed to house your GPS module securely for seamless integration into your aerial platforms.

name: Holybro GPS Extended Length Cable - JST GHR 10P 420mm
description: Introducing the Holybro GPS Extended Length Cable - 10P, your solution for seamless GPS connectivity over extended distances.

name: Holybro GPS Extended Length Cable - JST GHR 6P 420mm
description: Introducing the Holybro GPS Extended Length Cable - 6P, your solution for seamless GPS connectivity over extended distances.

name: Holybro H Rtk Unc Adapter 1 4 20
description: Introducing the Holybro 1/4" UNC Adapter for H-RTK, your solution for seamlessly integrating your H-RTK system with standard camera mounting hardware.

name: Holybro DroneCAN GPS Extended Length Cable - 45cm
description: Introducing the Holybro DroneCAN GPS Extended Length Cable, extending your drone's capabilities with enhanced flexibility and convenience.

name: Holybro H-RTK Unicore UM982 (Dual Antenna)
description: The Holybro H-RTK Unicore UM982, featuring a dual antenna system, is an advanced RTK GPS module offering high-precision positioning and unique capabilities for autopilots.

name: Holybro H-RTK F9P Ultralight GPS Module
description: The Holybro H-RTK F9P Ultralight GPS Module is a sophisticated, ultra-lightweight RTK GNSS module, ideal for applications where minimizing weight is crucial.

name: Holybro Micro M9N GPS Module w/ Case
description: The Holybro Micro M9N GPS is a compact, high-performance GPS module utilizing the advanced multi-constellation GNSS technology powered by the u-blox M9.

name: Holybro M10 Standard GPS w/ 10-Pin Cable
description: The Holybro M10 GPS uses multi-constellation GNSS powered by the u-blox M10 series, a concurrent GNSS receiver that can receive and track multiple GNSS systems.

name: Holybro Pixhawk 6C PM02 V3 + M9N GPS + Plastic Case
description: The Pixhawk® 6C is the latest update to the successful family of Pixhawk® flight controllers, based on the Pixhawk® FMUv6C Open Standard and Connector Standard.

name: Foxeer M10Q-120 GPS w/ 5883 Compass
description: Enhance your drone's navigation with the Foxeer M10Q-120 GPS.

name: Mateksys GNSS SAM-M10Q GPS Module - Gallileo/GLONASS/BeiDouB1C
description: The Mateksys GNSS SAM-M10Q GPS Module - Gallileo/GLONASS/BeiDouB1C uses a multi-constellation GNSS module powered by u-blox SAM-M10Q-00B.

name: Flywoo GOKU GM10 Nano V3 GPS Module
description: The Flywoo GOKU GM10 Nano V3 GPS Module is an ultra-lightweight GPS module at just 2.2g!

name: CubePilot The Cube Orange+ Standard Set ADS-B (IMU V8)
description: The Cube Orange+ Standard Set (IMU V8) features a high-performance H7 processor and the 1090MHz ADS-B receiver from uAvionix.

name: Holybro H-RTK F9P Rover Lite GNSS w/ 10-Pin Cable
description: The H-RTK F9P is the latest differential high-precision GNSS positioning system series from Holybro.

name: Holybro DroneCAN M8N GPS
description: The DroneCAN M8N GPS is the primary CAN protocol used by the ArduPilot and PX4 projects for communication with CAN peripherals. It is an open protocol with open communication, specification, and multiple open implementations.

name: Holybro H-RTK F9P Rover Lite GNSS 2nd GPS w/ 6-Pin Cable
description: The H-RTK F9P 2nd GPS is the latest differential high-precision GNSS positioning system series from Holybro.

name: Holybro Pixhawk 6C Aluminum Case + PM02 V3 Power Module + M9N GPS
description: The Pixhawk 6C FC combined with the PM02 V3 12S Power Module + M9N GPS brings tons of power to the autopilot and makes it super easy to power and locate the multirotor.

name: ZOHD KOPILOT Lite GPS Module Unit
description: The ZOHD Kopilot Lite GPS Module Unit is a spare part for the KOPILOT Autopilot System Flight Controller.

name: MATEKSYS M10-5883 GNSS & Compass
description: The MATEKSYS M10-5883 supports GNSS (GPS, GLONASS, Galileo, and BeiDou), offers great RF sensitivity, will help you pick up the best signals, and can improve the dynamic position accuracy with small antennas or in non-line-of-sight scenarios.

name: MATEKSYS AP Periph GNSS, M10-L4-3100 GPS Module
description: The MATEKSYS AP Periph GNSS, M10-L4-3100 GPS is equipped with AP_Periph L431 CAN node, MAX-M10S, RM3100, SPL06-001, DroneCAN protocol & UART_MSP, and many other cool specs that make this GPS a winner in the wing game!

name: CUAV NEO 3 Pro GPS Module w/ Stand
description: The CUAV NEO 3 Pro continues the hardware design of NEO V2, upgrades the GNSS module to Ublox NEO M9N, and supports Beidou, Galileo, GLONASS, and GPS at the same time.

name: CUAV X7+ Standard Autopilot Flight Controller - PX4/APM
description: The X7+® Standard Autopilot Flight Controller is a high-performance autopilot. It is an ideal choice for industrial drones and large-scale heavy-duty drones. The X7+ features an H7 processor, an upgraded sensor with a redundancy design, a temperature compensation system, and a CORE separate design.

name: CubePilot Here3 CAN GNSS GPS Module w/ iStand
description: The Here3 GPS (with iStand) is a high-precision GNSS system that supports RTK mode, built with CAN protocol. It is also designed to be dust-proof and splash-proof up to a certain limit.

name: Matek Ap Periph Gnss M9N F4 3100 Can Gps
description: M9N-F4 series is based on ArudPilots’ AP_Periph firmware,  It is a GNSS+COMPASS+BAROMETER+IMU peripheral with CAN/UAVCAN and UART/MSP interfaces, plus 4x spare UARTs, 1x I2C expansion bus for additional peripherals.

name: Holybro Pixhawk 6C Aluminum Case + PM07 Power Module + M9N GPS
description: The Pixhawk 6C FC combined with the PM07 12S Power Module + M9N GPS brings tons of power to the autopilot and makes it super easy to power and locate the multirotor.

name: iFlight M8Q-5883 V2.0 GPS Module w/ Compass
description: The iFlight M8Q-5883 GPS comes with an integrated QMC5883L compass module, built-in TCXO crystal, and farad capacitor for a faster hot start, additional front-end LNA and many other features!

name: TBS M8.2 GPS Glonass
description: Precision GPS / Glonass module for betaflight or pixhawk.

name: MATEKSYS GNSS M8Q-CAN, UAVCAN & MSP GPS
description: The Matek GNSS M8Q-CAN, UAVCAN & MSP GPS features AP F303 CAN node, SAM-M8Q, QMC5881L, DPS310, I2C, Uart1 & Uart3 breakout. UAVCAN protocol & UART_MSP.

name: HC-05 RF Wireless Bluetooth Transceiver Module RS232 / TTL to UART Converter and Adapter
description: HC-05 Bluetooth Module can be used in a Master or Slave configuration, making it a great solution for wireless communication.

name: Flywoo BT-NANO V3 Bluetooth Module
description: Add Bluetooth to your favorite quadcopter with Flywoo's superlight BT-NANO V3 Bluetooth Module! This super tiny Bluetooth Module will give you 30 meters of transmission range and more stable performance.

name: CubePilot The Cube Orange FD Standard Set + ADS-B
description: The Cube Orange Standard Set + ADS-B  flight controller comes with an H7 processor, features a 1,090 MHz ADS-B receiver from uAvionix, automatically avoids aircraft and Is integrated into the new ADS-B carrier board!

name: The Cube - Yellow (F7 Processor for Pixhawk)
description: Cube Yellow target to education, drones lovers and professional cost-effective flight control hardware providers.

name: MATEKSYS SAM-M8Q GPS Module
description: The SAM-M8Q GPS with GLONASS, Galileo, QZSS and SBAS receiver technology and built-in micro patch antenna.

name: Holybro Pixhawk 4 Neo-M8N GPS
description: Holybro now offers a new GPS which works with the Pixhawk 4. It has a UBLOX M8N module on it, as well as an IST8310 compass and tri-colored LED indicator, along with the Safety switch making the connection more convenient and simple.

name: Foxeer M10Q-250 GPS w/ 5883 Compass
description: The Foxeer M10Q-250 GPS boasts a powerful 10th-generation chip and support for multiple satellite systems.

name: GEPRC M10 DQ GPS Module
description: The GEP-M10 DQ GPS module offers a compact size, fast and stable positioning, and user-friendly operation.

name: Foxeer M10Q-180 GPS w/ 5883 Compass
description: The Foxeer M10Q-180 GPS boasts a powerful 10th-generation chip and support for multiple satellite systems,

name: HGLRC M100-5883 GPS Module
description: Boost your drone's navigation capabilities with the HGLRC M100-5883 GPS Module.

name: GEPRC M10 GPS Module
description: The GEP-M10 GPS module offers a compact size, fast and stable positioning, and user-friendly operation.

name: CubePilot Here3+ CAN GNSS GPS Module w/ iStand
description: The Here3+ GPS is a cost-efficient GNSS system that supports RTK mode with positioning accuracy down to centimeter-level in an ideal environment.

name: MATEKSYS M10Q-5883 GNSS & Compass
description: The MATEKSYS M10Q-5883 GNSS & Compass is a powerful multi-constellation GNSS module powered by u-blox SAM-M10Q-00B.

name: Holybro Micro M9N GPS Module w/o Case
description: The Holybro Micro M9N GPS is a compact and high-performance GPS module utilizing the advanced multi-constellation GNSS technology powered by the u-blox M9.

name: Pixhawk 2.1 Cube Black
description: The Pixhawk 2.1 Cube by Hex.

name: Holybro UART to USB-C Converter
description: Introducing the Holybro UART to USB-C Converter, your essential tool for seamless connectivity between UART-enabled devices and USB-C ports.
